tagline: Defensive security engineering, detection content, and operational data systems.
mission: Build practical tools for authorized security review.
Turn evidence, logs, and telemetry into measurable defensive action.
Keep security work reproducible, auditable, and grounded in artifacts.

now_building.focus: Evidence-linked analytics dashboard with normalized records and search-first review.
now_building.next: Validate evidence drilldowns, viewer gates, and source-linked summaries.

now_building.focus: Authorized public-surface audit utilities and security review workflows.
now_building.next: Expand tests, reporting, and input validation.

now_building.focus: Sigma, KQL, SPL, and Elastic detections backed by structured indicators.
now_building.next: Convert repeatable incident patterns into tested detection rules.

now_building.focus: Inventory, config review, service exposure checks, and rollback-safe automation.
now_building.next: Keep scripts small, auditable, and evidence-producing.
